---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for PDF Context Extractor
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the solution you'd like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use case

Who benefits from this and how? (e.g., students, researchers, ebook readers, developers)

## Mockups / examples

If applicable, add mockups, sketches, or examples from other tools.

## Priority

How important is this to you?

- [ ] Critical — blocking my workflow
- [ ] High — would significantly improve my use of the tool
- [ ] Medium — nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement
